{
  "workbench.colorTheme": "Default High Contrast",
  "workbench.iconTheme": "vs-minimal",
  "editor.accessibilitySupport": "on",
  "window.confirmBeforeClose": "always",
  "window.menuBarVisibility": "classic",
  "workbench.statusBar.visible": true,

  // --- SPEED & AUTOMATION (MODIFIED) ---
  "editor.formatOnSave": true, // Changed to true for instant cleanup
  "editor.formatOnPaste": true,
  "editor.formatOnType": true,
  "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
  "files.autoSave": "afterDelay",
  "files.autoSaveDelay": 10000, // Shorter delay for faster "Live Server" updates
  "editor.linkedEditing": true, // Renaming an HTML tag renames its pair automatically

  // --- AI INTEGRATION (COPILOT & GITLENS) ---
  "github.copilot.enable": {
    "*": true,
    "markdown": true,
    "yaml": true,
  },
  "github.copilot.editor.enableAutoCompletions": true,
  "inlineChat.mode": "live",
  "gitlens.ai.vscode.model": "copilot:gpt-4.1",

  // --- EMMET & INTELLISENSE ---
  "emmet.triggerExpansionOnTab": true,
  "emmet.includeLanguages": {
    "html": "html",
    "css": "css",
    "javascript": "javascript",
    "wix": "html",
  },
  "editor.suggest.snippetsPreventQuickSuggestions": false,

  // --- FRONT-END SPECIFIC VISUALS ---
  "editor.bracketPairColorization.enabled": true,
  "editor.guides.bracketPairs": "active",
  "editor.cursorBlinking": "smooth",
  "editor.cursorSmoothCaretAnimation": "on", // Smoother visual feel while typing
  "editor.minimap.autohide": "mouseover",
  "editor.stickyScroll.enabled": true,
  "editor.colorDecorators": true,
  "workbench.editorAssociations": {
    "*.zip": "default",
  },
  "editor.unicodeHighlight.invisibleCharacters": false,
  "editor.unicodeHighlight.ambiguousCharacters": false,
  "security.workspace.trust.untrustedFiles": "open", // Shows color squares next to CSS hex codes
  }
